'''Randi''' was a rookie [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] who joined [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|First Galactic Civil War]]. He fought in the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]] as a pilot in [[Red Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Red Squadron]] during the Battle of Endor. It was not known whether Randi survived the battle.

{{Char-stub}}
